title: Ultimate Creative
description: Experience the ultimate creative building experience with a perfect balance of optimisation and building mods, with many more to come!
body:
![modpack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80809437acf2f05af80cafd4452adfc311aa1d10_0.webp)
# Welcome
Welcome to ultimate creative, where you can build anything that you can imagine! With mods ranging from terralith, with it's mountainous peaks to blockus, with it's outlandish (but very stylish) new blocks! With the perfect balance of optimisation mods and building mods, this modpack is the perfect choice for any builder who wants to take their builds to the next level!

## Description
This modpack features many building mods such as the essentials for any builder (e.g: Axiom, Macaw's Mods) and also some lesser known ones, such as Cinch's mods and Masonry. Have fun playing with this immersive building modpack!

## Features
- New structures and biomes ([Oh the biomes we've gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty))
- Many new blocks ([Blockus](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockus), [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled), + Many more)
- Building Tools ([Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom))
- New Advancements ([Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Oh the biomes we've gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty))
- Better menu
- Over 10 resource packs
- Custom resource pack
- Over 150 mods
- All of macaw's mods!
